reviews.comment:
Excelente y completo servicio para el automotor. Cordialidad y eficiencia del personal. Venta de repuestos. Full 24 hs. Baños impecables

Excellent and comprehensive automotive service. Friendly and efficient staff. Spare parts available. Open 24 hours. Spotless restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Nefasto el servicio de YPF Boxes. Me acerque, pedí el servicio más completo (de 1 hora). No solo no hizo el chequeo electronico (sin avisarme), sino que solo tenia ganas de despacharme rápidamente. Del "chequeo integral", donde tengo un informe o un comentario sobre lo encontrado? Fue un cambio de aceite a precio premium nada más. Chequeo de punto de congelamiento? Escobillas limpia parabrisas? (ni revisaron que las de atras no andaban, la respuesta fue: Solo veo si tiene la goma, no reviso si limpia). Pésimo servicio, nefasto el personal que lo atiende.

(Translated by Google)
The service at YPF Boxes was terrible. I went there and asked for the most complete service (1 hour). Not only did they not perform the electronic check (without telling me), but they just seemed eager to get rid of me quickly. Where do I get a report or any feedback on the "comprehensive check"? It was just an oil change at premium prices, nothing more. No freezing point check? Windshield wipers? (They didn't even check that the rear ones weren't working; their response was: "I only check if the rubber is there, I don't check if it cleans"). Awful service, and the staff was awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXLTRMSGR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente! Enfocados para lograr el objetivo de el aprendizaje y práctica del alumno, motivando con disciplina. Algo que debemos tener para manejar un vehículo. Mi profesor Eddy fue excelente. Yo hice le curso en la Escuela de Conducción y Tránsito “Juan Manuel Fangio”
Avda. Casares y Avda. Sarmiento (frente al planetario)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! Focused on achieving the student's learning and practice goals, motivating them with discipline. Something we all need to drive a vehicle. My instructor, Eddy, was excellent. I took the course at the "Juan Manuel Fangio" Driving and Traffic School (Avda. Casares and Avda. Sarmiento, across from the planetarium).
